zones.name: Ruined Temple of Scarlet Rot

readAloud.punchy: A cathedral skeleton drowning in scarlet mire. Broken columns jut from the rot like islands. Somewhere in the red mist, Corwyn's voice screams.
readAloud.atmospheric: The air thickens with a wet, coppery stench. Through red mist, broken arches emerge — the skeleton of a cathedral half-swallowed by something worse than time. The floor is gone, replaced by a shallow lake of foul scarlet mire. Broken columns and fallen slabs jut from the rot like islands. And somewhere in the mist, you hear Corwyn's voice. Screaming.
readAloud.immersive: The air thickens with a wet, coppery stench long before you see the temple. Through the red mist, broken arches emerge — the skeleton of a cathedral half-swallowed by something worse than time. The floor is gone. In its place, a shallow lake of foul scarlet mire stretches from wall to crumbling wall. It moves. Not like water. Like something alive and spreading. Broken columns and fallen slabs of stone jut from the rot like islands — the only dry ground in sight. And somewhere in the mist, above the soft wet sounds of the rot, you hear a voice. Corwyn's voice. Screaming.

zones.description: A vast ruined temple consumed by scarlet rot. The Monstrous Crow nests among the broken arches, wearing stolen magical trinkets and mimicking Corwyn's voice to lure prey into the mire.

features.name: Scarlet Rot Terrain
features.description: Temple floor drowned in foul red mire. +1 Scarlet Rot stack when entering or starting turn. No save.

features.name: Elevated Ruins
features.description: Scattered rubble, broken columns, fallen masonry. Difficult terrain but safe from rot. The crow moves freely through both.

features.name: Corwyn's Voice
features.description: The crow periodically mimics Corwyn's screams, pleas, or warnings to lure PCs into the rot. DC 19 Insight to detect.

features.name: Crumbling Architecture
features.description: Columns and platforms: AC 15, 30 HP. If destroyed while a creature stands on it, creature falls into rot (+2 Scarlet Rot stacks).

features.name: Visibility
features.description: Red mist fills the temple. >60 ft. = lightly obscured. Crow's blindsight 120 ft. and truesight 60 ft. ignore this.

encounters.name: The Monstrous Crow
monsters: Monstrous Crow of the Scarlet Rot x1
encounters.notes: CR 21 solo boss. See encounter sidebar for full mechanics (rot tracking, trinkets, villain actions, kenku recall).
dialogue: "Help me... I'm up here..." (Corwyn's voice, mimicry)
"Please — stop! It's me! You're killing me!" (Death Throes trigger)
"Run... it's too late for me... save yourselves..." (bait to draw PCs closer)

npcs.name: Corwyn (Mimicked)
dialogue: "I can hear you! I'm trapped inside!"

treasure.name: Gleaming Eye
treasure.description: Stolen trinket (Foresight). Can be recovered from the crow's corpse.

treasure.name: Rattling Chain
treasure.description: Stolen trinket (Haste). Can be recovered from the crow's corpse.

treasure.name: Feathered Charm
treasure.description: Stolen trinket (Flight + Gust). Can be recovered from the crow's corpse.

dmNotes: The Scarlet Rot tracker is the encounter's core mechanic. Keep it visible at all times.
Death Throes Mimicry auto-triggers at 100 HP. Do not forget this.
Kenku Recall punishes repeated attacks — the tracker will flag these automatically.
The Feint reaction includes a literal prompt to read aloud to the next player.

senses.sight: Red mist obscures everything beyond 60 ft. Broken arches and columns emerge from the haze like bones. The scarlet mire glows faintly, casting everything in a diseased, amber-red light.
senses.sound: The wet shifting of the mire. Distant dripping. The scrape of talons on stone. And Corwyn's voice — screaming, pleading, warning — echoing from everywhere and nowhere.
senses.smell: Copper and rot. Wet decay. The sharp, chemical burn of something fungal and wrong.
senses.touch: The air is thick and humid, coating exposed skin in a faint red moisture. The stone underfoot is slick and crumbling.
senses.instinct: Something is watching you from above. Every shadow could be the crow. Every scream could be real.

music.name: Scarlet Rot Boss
music.description: Oppressive, diseased atmosphere with building dread

music.name: Ruined Cathedral
music.description: Eerie exploration of a corrupted holy place
music.searchTerm: dark souls ruined cathedral ambient dark choir

sounds.name: Wet Rot Ambience
sounds.description: Bubbling, shifting liquid. Dripping. Organic squelching.
sounds.searchTerm: swamp ambience bubbling rot dark fantasy

sounds.name: Crow Shrieks
sounds.description: Distant bird-like screeches mixed with human screams
